goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 09:30' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'arrival time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'cambridge arts theatre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'attraction type', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
